case_title: GILFIX & LA POLL ASSOCIATES LLP VS. KATHY KATE ANDERSON

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100042853)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER GILFIX & LA POLL ASSOCIATES LLP'S NOTICE OF HEARING (RE PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD) IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND JUDGMENT TO THE COURT. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: CONNIE J. PARCHMAN, CSR 6137

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER GILFIX & LA POLL ASSOCIATES LLP RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT ANDERSON, KATHY "KATE" $42,198.07 PRINCIPAL, $5,810.77 INTEREST, $125.00 AAA COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $48,133.84, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER GILFIX & LA POLL ASSOCIATES LLP'S Notice Of Hearing (re petition to confirm contractual arbitration award) Appearances: Stephen Vernon, Esq. of the Vernon Law Office (650) 493-8483, appearing for Petitioner, and moving party.(Appearing thru Court Call). No other appearances. Ruling: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
Granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and judgment to the Court. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Connie J. Parchman, CSR 6137
